hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Store each roll result in its own variable, like: let attack = roll(20)

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: You need three separate variables — one for each die roll

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Announce each roll using the variable you stored it in

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Calculate total damage by adding the base damage and bonus variables together
